steps.title: Represent the equal parts
steps.content:
Let each of the two equal parts have length $x$ centimeters. The three parts add to $128$ centimeters.
$$52+x+x=128$$

steps.title: Solve for one part
steps.content: Combine the equal parts and solve. $$52+2x=128$$ $$2x=76$$ $$x=38$$ The answer is 38.
